summary: Iteration 3: validated NadaRuns Driver rebrand + 4-digit OTP verification flow + Wallet screen. Backend: 24/24 pytest passing (16 regression + 8 new for OTP/wallet). Frontend: NadaRuns brand text on home status pill ✓, settings link-payouts navigates to /wallet ✓, wallet shows $balance/pending/'Weekly • Mondays' schedule/45 txns including payout ✓, wallet-back-button returns to settings ✓. OTP flow: dragged swipe-confirm-pickup successfully opens otp-modal with all 4 otp-digit-{0..3} inputs + otp-cancel-button + 'Demo code: XXXX' hint; wrong OTP shows 'Incorrect code' error (backend 400); correct OTP closes modal and order advances to picked_up.

issues: RN-Web warnings 'shadow* style props deprecated, use boxShadow' (non-blocking, pre-existing since iter1)
RN-Web warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents' from KeyboardAvoidingView/OtpModal (non-blocking)

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-maps still listed in plugins array (logged PluginError on every Metro start). Same finding as iter2 — non-blocking on web but will fail native dev-client builds. Recommended removal.

action_items: (Carryover from iter2) Remove 'react-native-maps' entry from plugins array in /app/frontend/app.json — it has no app.plugin.js.
(Optional polish) Migrate remaining shadow* style props to boxShadow + pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents on KeyboardAvoidingView to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: verify-otp endpoint correctly raises HTTPException(400, 'Invalid OTP') and HTTPException(404) for missing orders; field selection by kind is clean.
Wallet endpoint correctly buckets earnings into pending vs available based on 48h age threshold; synthesises a payout txn with negative amount; sorts by timestamp desc; numbers rounded to 2 decimals.
ensure_seed() OTP migration uses MongoDB $rand expression to back-fill 4-digit codes for existing orders (29 orders migrated on this run) — idempotent and correct.
Frontend OtpModal correctly auto-submits when all 4 digits filled, supports paste, handles Backspace, focuses first input on open, clears + refocuses on error.
order.tsx: gating logic correctly intercepts SwipeToConfirm onComplete when otp not yet verified and shows the modal first — design as specified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all iter3 testIDs + flows verified end-to-end including swipe-triggered OTP modal)

seed_data_creation: Backend on startup migrated 29 existing orders to add pickup_otp/dropoff_otp + verified flags. Test fixture forces a fresh pending order via POST /api/orders/seed-new-pending to capture the new OTPs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter3 backend = 24/24 pytest. Swipe-to-confirm CAN be triggered on web via Playwright mouse drag (sx → ex over ~30 steps with 25ms each). The order.tsx onComplete handler then opens OtpModal which we fully exercised. To replay: POST /api/orders/seed-new-pending → /accept → /advance×2 → grab pickup_otp from response → navigate to /order → drag [data-testid=swipe-confirm-pickup] full width.
